ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the item is relevant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "us_equivalent" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_equivalent" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_equivalents" (
  "size_equivalent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size equivalent mapping */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size equivalent */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* AU size equivalent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_equivalent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_equivalents_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the item-size mapping */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock level for the specific item size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard followed in the region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the customer is located */,
  "preferred_size_standard" TEXT /* Preferred size standard of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is part of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that contains this item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L)
Unique identifier for each size equivalent mapping
Unique identifier for the item-size mapping
